title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices to protect data from cyber threats. This is the final lecture in the CS50 for Business course available through edX and Harvard extension programs.
